name: Claude-Skills-Governance-Risk-and-Compliance
description: Claude Skills for Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC): Expert-level compliance guidance for ISO 27001, SOC 2, FedRAMP, GDPR, HIPAA, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, TSA Cybersecurity, and ISO 42001 AI Management System. Skills scored 94% vs a baseline of 72% without using Skills.
